question.content: Points A and B move on y=x^2 with OA perpendicular OB, and OC is perpendicular to AB at C. Find only the maximum distance from C to the y-axis. Answer format requirement: <expr>. Strictly forbidden: any extra text beyond this format.

step_1.content: Fix the base geometric configuration and identify invariant relations.
